name: llm-obsidian
description: LLM-powered self-organizing second brain for Obsidian: wiki companion skills, local hybrid retrieval (ollama bge-m3 + BM25), DragonScale memory mechanisms, MCP HTTP gateway, parallel task orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Obsidian LLM wiki workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: A self-organizing Obsidian vault companion for Codex: ingest sources, query accumulated knowledge, file session notes, lint wiki health, and maintain DragonScale-style long-term memory.
